_doc: The Brothers' War (BRO) booster recipe. Generated by scripts/gen-booster-contents.mjs from data/_collation-facts/bro.json (source: The Collation Project, lethe.xyz/mtg/collation). Edit the facts file and regenerate; do not hand-edit this file unless you also remove its facts source. Set composition: 101C / 80U / 63R / 26M. Collation: sequential, multi-run (A/B/C commons), 112-card sheets (JP). Occasional foil (1:45) modelled by folding foil odds into one common slot. Notes: Large set: 6 DFC mythics. Additional 63 retro artifacts (18 uncommon, 30 rare, 15 mythic) available in the dedicated retro-artifact slot. Page only documents the Japanese printing (US/Belgian not detailed). 36 packs per box. Retro-artifact slot is an extra slot beyond the standard 14 game cards; full pack listed as ad + retro + rare + 3 unc + 10 com (16 cards incl. ad).
